description: useOptionalI18n returns context inside I18nProvider and null outside without throwing
Component using useOptionalI18n renders on a page without I18nProvider (auth-page scenario) without crashing, falling back to default locale
DatePicker renders 2026-06-10 as locale short date under fr (10/06/2026) and de (10.06.2026)
DatePicker under en renders MM/dd/yyyy-equivalent short date (no regression for English users)
DatePicker honors displayFormat prop override regardless of locale
DatePicker call-site audit documented: zero call sites parse the displayed string
DateTimePicker with explicit timeFormat='24h' renders 24h time with locale date under fr
DateTimePicker without timeFormat renders locale-derived date+time ('P p') under en and de
Calendar shows French weekday/month names when locale is fr
Calendar MonthYearSelect caption shows localized month name under es
CurrencyInput formats 1234.56 as '1.234,56' under de and '1 234,56' under fr on blur
CurrencyInput under fr: typing '12,5' fires onChange with 12.5 (not 125 or 1250)
CurrencyInput under de: typing '1.234,56' parses to 1234.56
CurrencyInput under en: typing '1,234.56' still parses to 1234.56 (no regression)
CurrencyInput round-trip (format → parse → format) is lossless for en, de, fr, pl across 0, 0.5, 999, 1234.56, 1000000.01
CurrencyInput clears to empty and fires onChange(undefined) on invalid input in all tested locales
PrintOptionsDialog renders Date cell values using the active locale
ReportEngine.formatValue with locale 'de' renders currency as 1.234,56 € style and with no locale renders en-US style (backward compat)
ReportEngine formatNumber/formatPercentage/formatDate respect passed locale in packages/reporting copy
server/src ReportEngine copy produces identical localized output to packages/reporting copy for the same inputs
executeReport passes hierarchically-resolved locale into ReportEngine (unit test with mocked getHierarchicalLocaleAction)
filterPseudoLocales returns xx/yy when NODE_ENV=development and strips them when NODE_ENV=production
filterPseudoLocales strips pt in both development and production
Dev server: MSP user language picker lists Pseudo (xx) and Pseudo (yy); production build does not (manual/visual via dev stack)
Selecting xx in dev persists preference, survives reload, and renders pseudo-accented strings on a translated MSP page
actions.print / actions.printOptions resolve in every namespace that references them (no raw-key rendering in print/export menus)
find-missing-i18n-keys reports 0 missing for msp/workflows after backfill
find-missing-i18n-keys reports 0 missing for msp/email-providers after backfill
find-missing-i18n-keys reports 0 missing for msp/integrations after backfill
find-missing-i18n-keys reports 0 missing for features/tickets after backfill
find-missing-i18n-keys reports 0 missing for msp/clients, msp/assets, msp/user-activities after backfill
find-missing-i18n-keys exits 0 across the entire repo
Backfilled en values match the defaultValue strings previously rendered (spot-check 20 keys against git history of components)
validate-translations passes after backfill: all 7 locales have key parity with en including new keys
Backfilled keys preserve interpolation variables across all locales (validate-translations variable check green)
Regenerated xx/yy pseudo-locales contain every backfilled key
MspClientTickets has zero hardcoded user-visible strings (i18n audit test asserting useTranslation usage + key coverage)
Client page Tickets tab renders pseudo-accented strings under xx locale (column headers, filters, 'Loading tickets...', search placeholder)
MspClientAssets has zero hardcoded user-visible strings (i18n audit test)
Client page Assets tab renders pseudo-accented strings under xx ('Loading assets...', 'All asset types...' filter)
MspContactTickets has zero hardcoded user-visible strings (i18n audit test)
InteractionsFeed renders translated strings under fr (search, filter, reset, apply controls)
OverallInteractionsFeed renders translated strings under fr
SchedulingInteractionDetails renders translated strings under fr
All new P3 keys present in en + 7 locales + pseudo (validate-translations green)
Navigating to /msp/clients?tab=tickets loads required namespaces without missing-namespace console warnings
msp-composition sweep documented: each of the 16 remaining files listed with 'no user-visible strings' verdict
grep for '_plural' across server/public/locales returns zero matches after migration
t('teams.details.memberCount', {count: 1}) renders singular and {count: 5} renders plural under en
Polish plural forms resolve correctly for counts 1 (_one), 2 (_few), 5 (_many) on migrated keys
AdminSessionManagement renders correct subtitle for 1 session and 5 sessions via single t() call with both sessionCount and userCount interpolated
Interaction-types import toast renders correct singular/plural under en and pl
validate-translations does not warn on pl _few/_many suffixes (CLDR-aware)
validate-translations errors when pl omits a required _many form for a key that has _one/_other in en (negative test with fixture)
validate-translations accepts en having only _one/_other (does not demand _few/_many from English)
Pseudo-locale generator output contains plural-suffixed keys with accents applied and variables intact
validate-translations full run: 0 errors, 0 warnings
CI workflow runs find-missing-i18n-keys job and fails on a fixture branch referencing a nonexistent key
CI workflow triggers on a PR touching only packages/**/*.tsx (no locale changes)
CI green on no-op PR from clean main after P5
Existing .i18n.test.* audit suites pass unchanged after each phase
npx tsc --noEmit passes for packages/ui, packages/reporting, packages/msp-composition, packages/clients, packages/scheduling after changes
